comment: Baseline: K=3 Gaussian on rolling-200 drawdown, mu-sort labelling. From regime_drawdown_2022.org.
Proposal: K=3 full-Sigma MVN on (r,vol5,dd200), NH-HMM softmax(VIX). Return-sort labelling.
Ablation: multivariate obs alone (trivar MVN, homogeneous A). Isolates the observation channel.
Ablation: NH transitions alone (drawdown-200 univariate, softmax(VIX) A). Isolates the transition.
Phase3: K=3 multivariate Student-t (full Sigma, per-state nu), homogeneous A. Fat tails to crack COVID.
Phase3 capstone: K=3 multivariate Student-t + NH-HMM softmax(VIX). COVID-cracker x fat-tail smoothness.
